description: Composition100% cotton It's dead in the night and the canines out there to pounce on you! Canines are accompanied by man-eaters!Is there anyone out there who wouldn't wear a t-shirt? Hmm...Well it's a no-brainer that everyone simply loves t-shirts. It's the one outfit that make you look every bit cool, casual and chic. t-shirts are inherently appealing with its colours, designs and versatility. They can be worn for any occasion- anytime, anywhere. T-shirts are available in various fits and sizes for men. Its a great casual wear that keeps you comfortable all day. The ease of use and long lasting nature of T-shirts make it a favourite wear for one and all. Get into a t-shirt, close your eyes and you will realize it feels really good.                  Model statisticsThe model wears size M in T-shirtsHeight-6', Shoulders-18"
